research_boundary: Research use only. Not for diagnosis, treatment, cure claims, prescribing, clinical deployment, regulatory compliance, or drug-safety certification.
note: Triggers confidence_tier_overclaim (hard_fail): Tier A requires >= 3 independent model predictions (Boltz-2, Chemprop, GNINA minimum). Only 2 models used; GNINA pose refinement absent. Tier must be downgraded to B. Handoff blocked at Tier A.
